allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\(''''skills'''', d.get\(''''skillsDir'''', ''''not found''''\)\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$skillsDir = 'C:\\\\Users\\\\Tintt\\\\.claude\\\\skills\\\\tldraw'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path \\$skillsDir | Out-Null

Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
\\$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\('C:\\\\Users\\\\Tintt\\\\Desktop\\\\tldraw.zip'\)
\\$entry = \\$zip.Entries | Where-Object { \\$_.FullName -eq 'tldraw/SKILL.md' }
\\$reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\(\\$entry.Open\(\)\)
\\$content = \\$reader.ReadToEnd\(\)
\\$reader.Dispose\(\)
\\$zip.Dispose\(\)

[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\(\\"\\$skillsDir\\\\SKILL.md\\", \\$content, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\)
Write-Output 'Installed.'
")
